def negative_exception_raised_without_chaining_original_cause():
    rule_id = "exception_raised_without_chaining_original_cause"
    family = "discipline"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "New exception raised inside except block without `from e`, discarding the original cause."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
